title: VimFu — z. Center First Non-Blank
description: z. works like zz but also moves the cursor to the first non-blank character on the line. Combines scrolling with cursor positioning.

setup.comment: Set TERM for proper color support in Neovim

steps.say: Z dot is like Z Z, but it also moves the cursor to the first non-blank character. Center and align in one move.

steps.comment: --- Demo 1: jump, position cursor at end, use z. ---

steps.say: Jump to line twenty three, the Forge class. Move to the end of the line.
Z dot. The line centers, and the cursor jumps to the first non-blank character.
The cursor jumped from the end of the line to the C in class. That is the first non-blank character.
Jump to line thirty four, end of line.
Z Z first. The line centers, but the cursor stays at the end.
Now Z dot. The line stays centered, but the cursor moves to the first non-blank.
That's the difference. Z Z keeps the cursor position, Z dot aligns it.
Z dot. Center the line and snap to the first non-blank character.
